summary: Completed comprehensive testing of QR Codes and Satisfaction module. All 17 backend API tests passed. Frontend fully functional with all 8 Housekeeping tabs visible, QR Code generator working, and public satisfaction survey with 9 languages and 4 criteria working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/satisfaction/public/survey/{token} - All 9 languages supported (FR, EN, ES, IT, AR, ZH, JA, PT, DE)
Backend: POST /api/satisfaction/public/survey/{token} - Submit unsatisfied survey triggers escalation (200)
Frontend: All 8 Housekeeping tabs visible (Réception, Direction, Gouvernante, Femme de chambre, Maintenance, Petit-déj, QR Codes, Satisfaction)
Frontend: QR Codes tab shows QR Code generator with existing zones
Frontend: Satisfaction tab shows config with stats (responses, satisfaction rate, average rating, pending tickets)
Frontend: Public satisfaction survey page loads at /satisfaction/{token}
Frontend: 9 language flags displayed (FR, EN, ES, IT, AR, ZH, JA, PT, DE)
Frontend: Language switching changes all form text correctly
Frontend: Arabic language displays RTL text correctly
Frontend: 4 criteria with star ratings (Propreté, Confort, Équipements, Service)
Frontend: Star rating interaction works for all criteria
Frontend: Form submission works and shows success message with average rating
critical_code_review_comments: Public satisfaction endpoints correctly implemented without authentication requirement
9 languages properly supported with correct flag emojis and translations
4 criteria (cleanliness, comfort, equipment, service) with weighted average calculation
Auto-escalation system triggers for unsatisfied responses (rating < 4.0)
QR zones support multiple types: room, restaurant, spa, breakfast, pool, gym, lobby, parking, custom
All data-testid attributes correctly implemented for Housekeeping tabs
seed_data_creation: Test survey responses created via public API during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: QR Codes and Satisfaction module fully tested. Backend APIs: /api/qrcodes/hotels/{hotel_id}/zones (CRUD), /api/satisfaction/public/survey/{token} (GET/POST - no auth), /api/satisfaction/hotels/{hotel_id}/config, /api/satisfaction/hotels/{hotel_id}/stats. Frontend: HousekeepingModule.jsx with 8 tabs including QR Codes and Satisfaction. Public survey at /satisfaction/{token} with 9 languages and 4 criteria. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_qrcodes_satisfaction.py.
